# Disallow ternary expressions as direct className values (`purist/no-classname-ternary`)

💡 This rule is manually fixable by [editor suggestions](https://eslint.org/docs/latest/use/core-concepts#rule-suggestions).

<!-- end auto-generated rule header -->

## Options

<!-- begin auto-generated rule options list -->

| Name     | Description                                          | Type   | Choices      |
| :------- | :--------------------------------------------------- | :----- | :----------- |
| `helper` | Preferred className helper to target in suggestions. | String | `cn`, `clsx` |

<!-- end auto-generated rule options list -->

Suggestions are only provided when the chosen helper is already declared or imported in the file.
